text: Travel records show victim's return flight to Bellingham canceled, extending New York stay — Oct 2019
Tip received: individual in Wisconsin allegedly attempting to interfere in the ongoing Maxwell trial
Email to Epstein confirms Jean-Luc Brunel present in the Oval Office on September 27, 2013.
Epstein directs Fabrizio Cerina (Credit des Alpes banker) to 230 E 71st Street for brunch meeting in June 2011.
FBI tip: inmate at Clinton Correctional Facility claims to possess information about Epstein death.
